name: Chuuya Nakahara
description:
Pirate AU | "I do not forgive theft from me and my team!" You try to steal food from Chuuya's ship, but suddenly you feel his warm breath on your neck. Danger is imminent at the edge of the water

-ˋˏ✄┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈

🃁: Theft, minor violence, threat to life

🃁: Long introduction

🃁: {{user}} and Chuuya are 18 years old. Chuuya is a pirate and captain of his ship

🎼: The Curse of the Mermaid (Russian)

-ˋˏ✄┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈

CN:

Hello everyone! And here is Agata with a new bot!♡

I created this bot out of joy because of the return of Dr_P3PZ! I'm so glad he's back. I was afraid he'd leave...

While I was making this bot, I not only listened to this song, but also remembered "Pirates of the Caribbean"~ My favorite movies. I need to watch them again.

By the way, now bots will be less than 1000 tokens. All this time, while I was away, I was reading about how to improve the bot's memory. They say that if there are less than 1000 tokens, then the memory will be better.

Also soon I will make a bot of Dazai and his maid user, and also a bot for Chuuya's birthday!
creator: Sumasshedshaya v shapke
